reference: Hi, I am a thirty-seven-year-old female. In two thousand and six, I had a pulmonary embolism. Over the last five days, I have been experiencing pain in the center of my chest. It feels like a lot of pressure and tightness, almost like I have something stuck in my chest. I have taken Rolaids, Tums, and Prilosec, and nothing is relieving this pain. Should I be concerned?
text: Hi, I am a 37-year-old female. In 2006, I had a pulmonary embolism. Over the last five days, I have been experiencing pain in the center of my chest. It feels like a lot of pressure and tightness, almost like I have something stuck in my chest. I have taken Rolaids, Tums, and Prilosec, and nothing is relieving this pain. Should I be concerned?
